name: fix-tests-styles
description: Audit and fix CSS ownership, unused CSS, unit test ownership, and unit test coverage across repository packages.

interface.shortDescription: Fix CSS ownership and unit test coverage
interface.longDescription: Audit and fix misplaced or unused CSS, unit test ownership, missing unit tests, and weak test coverage across repository packages.
defaultPrompt: Use $fix-tests-styles to audit and fix CSS ownership and unit test coverage across this repository.
